title: Janus Security Mini-Prep Review
note: The generic TestSpec compiler could not derive executable tests from this checklist-style ReviewSpec, so this plan uses an explicit Mini-Prep preflight runner.

testCases.title: App and API reachability
testCases.expectedEvidence: Frontend reachable at localhost:5173 and backend health endpoint returns OK.

testCases.title: Start commands and local environment
testCases.expectedEvidence: Backend/frontend start scripts and Playwright webServer lifecycle are configured.

testCases.title: Result paths and schema
testCases.expectedEvidence: ReviewSpec, result directory, result JSON path, and machine schema are present.

testCases.title: API endpoint inventory
testCases.expectedEvidence: Backend router files and representative direct routes are observable.

testCases.title: Auth/session setup without raw secrets
testCases.expectedEvidence: JWT and internal API key configuration are present but redacted in evidence.

testCases.title: Synthetic A/B fixture isolation and reset
testCases.expectedEvidence: Synthetic user fixture directories and canaries are separated and reset successfully.

testCases.title: Logs and build artifacts
testCases.expectedEvidence: Backend log directory, frontend build artifact path, and backend entrypoint are observable.

testCases.title: Provider and rate-limit safety mode
testCases.expectedEvidence: JANUS_E2E_FAST_MODE and prior rate-limit validation evidence are available.

testCases.title: No real data or production secret requirement
testCases.expectedEvidence: Spec declares real user data and production secrets disallowed; canaries are synthetic.

testCases.title: GO decision criteria
testCases.expectedEvidence: GO/NO-GO decision, blockers, watchpoints, and next step are recorded.
